caption: A video conference call displays a grid of multiple participants in their individual home settings. The participants include men and women of various ages; some wear glasses and casual attire, such as t-shirts and button-down shirts. Several people are seen listening or speaking, with some resting their chins on their hands. Visible backgrounds include bookshelves, home interiors, and outdoor greenery. On-screen text labels identifying participants appear at the bottom of each video tile, including names such as "Jerry Michiko," "Howard Silverman," "Barbara," "Burtis," "Regina Shivers," "Patrick Murphy," "Era_collaborator," "Jim Burtis," and "Seymour Neve." The video shows a repeating loop of the same sequence of faces and layouts, as the arrangement of participants and their poses are identical across the progression, suggesting a static screen capture or a looping clip of the digital meeting.
